title: marsdenia teysmannii
intro: Marsdenia teysmannii, also known as the Java vine or Java milk vine, is a type of plant species native to Indonesia, specifically in the island of Java. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Marsdenia teysmannii include its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Marsdenia teysmannii can be prepared as herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
